title: AN ACT FIXING THE SALARIES OF CERTAIN POSITIONS IN THE VETERANS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL.

chunks.text:
S. No. 433 H. No.11318 / 65 OG No. 18, 4484 (May 5, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5205, June 15, 1968 ]

AN ACT FIXING THE SALARIES OF CERTAIN POSITIONS IN THE VETERANS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:
